profile.description: The local dataspace profile id that matches a protocol version advertised by the counter party.

version.description: The DSP protocol version shared by the local profile and the counter party entry.

binding.description: The protocol binding for this match (copied from the counter party version entry).

CounterParty.description: Counter party coordinates for a matched protocol version.

path.description: The path under the counter party's base URL where the matching DSP version is exposed, as returned in the well-known versions document.

dataServiceEndpoint.description: The counter party's data service endpoint URL.
